text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I constructed and executed what I believed to be
the most effective plan for victory...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And yet it resulted in failure... Where did I go
wrong?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I... I don't know how to proceed from here...
choice_data_list: We can think of something together.
All you can do is keep running!
All you can do is keep running!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I... I don't know how to proceed from here...
choice_data_list: We can think of something together.
All you can do is keep running!
All you can do is keep running!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
choice_data_list: It's okay to lean on me at times like this.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: You're right. I am not alone in my efforts.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Besides, plans only improve each time we address
their weak points!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash lifts her chin up, ready to face the
world head-on.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
choice_data_list:
You'll find the answer as long as you keep
running.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You are absolutely correct... There's no use in
wallowing in despair and letting myself spiral.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Continuing to run is the only way to improve.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much, Trainer. Your blunt honesty
has opened my eyes.
